project.name: Bun
project.problem: The JavaScript toolchain is a pile of separate tools — runtime, bundler, test runner, package manager.

main.headline: Installs, but instant

stats.label: faster installs than npm — and it's a bundler, test runner, and package manager too.

main.caption: One fast toolchain for JavaScript and TypeScript.

main.code:
bun install       # up to 30x faster than npm
bun test          # built-in test runner
bun build ./app.ts  # native bundler
bun run start     # the runtime
main.caption: Runtime, bundler, tester, installer — one binary.
